items.title: [Steam论坛] Stuck in Logging into the User Center
items.summary:
As the title suggest, I wanted to play on PC, I've tried this a bit before on my old phone and wanted to start fresh with a new account on Steam but I'm just stuck here at the front page and it just keeps saying stuck in logging into the user center, it loads a bit and then just disappears, I just keep spamming Enter Mythag to no avail.

Is this a bug or what? My internet is pretty high, I run about 700-900mpbs so I highly doubt it's my internet....
items.author: Keres

items.title: [Steam论坛] Interface is Overwhelming
items.summary:
I love Saya no Uta, so I decided to give this game a try, but let me say.

I haven't seen an interface 1/10 this convoluted and confusing in my life. Dwarf Fortress is simple and straightforward compared to this!

How many currencies does this thing have? How many sidequests (I assume that's what they are; don't really know) available from the very beginning, with no context?

I don't know what order I should play things, for a balanced and challenging experience. Should I click on the Saya thin
items.author: ScorpionWasp
